description: Style Note boss In Motion from the designer house of hugo boss is a refreshing deodorant that keeps you smelling good all day. Strong and lasting scent marks this one out. A masculine and refreshing fragrance makes this deodorant one of our favourites. Product Details Boss In Motion is a deodorant for men which comes in an aerosol spray canister Caution Do not use near fire, flame or heat Avoid spraying in eyes Size 150 ml
